title: Identity Verification
cardDescription: Upload the required documents to activate {{name}}'s account

document.label: Document
document.typeError: Select a PDF file or JPG/PNG/WebP image
document.sizeError: File size must not exceed 5 MB

status.notSubmitted: This document has not been uploaded yet

info.title: What happens after uploading?
info.description: The documents will appear in the admin panel for review. The account will remain suspended until all required documents are approved.
